category_sources: source_facts.description says Version control system; official nongnu homepage says CVS is a version control system and source configuration management component.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cvs; official Savannah project name is Concurrent Versions System.
docs_sources: Official nongnu homepage has a documentation section; GNU hosts the CVS manual for CVS 1.11.23.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official nongnu homepage points to browsing current CVS sources on Savannah, and Savannah lists the CVS source repository for group cvs.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official homepage identify CVS as a command-line source configuration/version-control system.
